github:github-octoflow-api:184:9f3b7c2d8.summary: The cache layer is a useful performance win, but the current key omits the viewer role and can leak activity totals across permission scopes.
github:github-octoflow-api:184:9f3b7c2d8.rawOutput: Found one high-impact cache key issue and one lower-risk invalidation gap around archived projects.

comments.body: This key only includes the project id, so a restricted viewer can receive a summary cached for an owner. Include viewerRole or permission scope in the key.
Consider invalidating this when projects are archived or restored, otherwise the dashboard can show stale activity for up to five minutes.

github:github-octoflow-api:176:0d7a6c20b.summary: The endpoint covers the main workflow and reports partial failures clearly. The validation should reject duplicate emails before sending invitations.
github:github-octoflow-api:176:0d7a6c20b.rawOutput: Suggested adding duplicate detection and a test for repeated addresses in one request.

comments.body: Normalize first, then deduplicate the list before the loop. A repeated address currently receives multiple invites.

github:github-launchpad-web:92:bd441671a.summary: The layout is clearer and keyboard navigation remains intact. One empty-state branch still renders an enabled submit button with no selected plan.
github:github-launchpad-web:92:bd441671a.rawOutput: Checked billing settings flow. One submit-state bug found in the empty plan branch.

comments.body: This still allows submit when plans is empty and selectedPlan is undefined. Disable until a concrete plan is selected.
